feed.title: Abhijeet Singh Portfolio
feed.subtitle: Software Engineer with expertise in full‑stack development, cloud services, and AI‑driven applications.

entry.title: I Increased Retrieval From Top-5 to Top-20. My Answers Got Worse

link.title: I Increased Retrieval From Top-5 to Top-20. My Answers Got Worse

entry.summary: The standard advice for improving RAG retrieval quality is: retrieve more candidates, then filter down. Bigger pool, better reranker, better answers. I followed that advice in my RAG System. On PDFs...

entry.title: I Tested Chunking on Docs, PDFs, and Code. The Winner Changed Every Time.

link.title: I Tested Chunking on Docs, PDFs, and Code. The Winner Changed Every Time.

entry.summary: I assumed chunking was a solved problem. Pick a text splitter, set 512 tokens, add some overlap, move on. After running structured experiments across three different data types, that assumption coll...

entry.title: 5 Critical Failures We Hit Shipping a Multi-Tenant RAG Chatbot to 500+ Enterprises

link.title: 5 Critical Failures We Hit Shipping a Multi-Tenant RAG Chatbot to 500+ Enterprises

entry.summary: Our first enterprise tenant onboarded on a Monday. By Wednesday, 30% of their documents had been silently indexed as empty strings. No error. No exception. The chatbot just said "I don't have enough...

entry.title: Why Our RAG System Was Silently Returning Wrong Answers — And How We Fixed It

link.title: Why Our RAG System Was Silently Returning Wrong Answers — And How We Fixed It

entry.summary: For 3 days, our RAG system was confident. Every query returned an answer. Response times were stable. No errors in the logs. By every operational metric, the system was working. Our RAGAS faithfulne...
